title: $DARKSOL Token Command Room Split Out
body: Moved the token section off the homepage into a dedicated token.html command room: live price feed, utility map, task tiers, staged payment intake, and a roadmap for on-chain reads, pay-to-task, holder gates, and roadmap signaling.

title: Terminal Hits v0.17 with 6 Major Releases
body: 15 releases in one night set the pace -- now @darksol/terminal is at v0.17.0 (Apr 9), gpu-orchestrator at v0.8.0 (Apr 17), darksol core at v0.5.0, context-kernel at v0.3.0, and @darksol/bankr-router at v1.2.2. All dependency-clean, all published.

title: Synthesis Hackathon -- Two Submissions Locked
body: Shipped two entries for the Synthesis Hackathon: the full Autonomous Agent Economy Stack (5 contracts, 16 modules, 62 tests, 10+ live trades on Base) and AutoResearch (230+ experiments, best score 8.176). Both are live on Devfolio. Winners announced March 25.

title: npm Package Sweep -- 4 Packages Updated
body: Bumped @darksol/terminal to 0.14.1, darksol to 0.4.1, gpu-orchestrator to 0.5.1, and @darksol/bankr-router to 1.2.1. All dependency updates, all tests passing, all published and verified.

title: Cross-DEX Arb Engine Goes Live
body: Terminal v0.13.0 shipped with a 6-DEX arbitrage engine spanning 5 chains. v0.13.1 added AI intelligence -- strategy briefings, pair discovery, threshold tuning, and pattern filtering baked into the scanner.

title: Terminal Marathon -- 15 Releases in One Night
body: From v0.4.2 to v0.6.3 in a single session. Casino integration (4 games), x402 auto-pay client, oracle wiring, interactive card ordering, deep black UI theme. 42 files changed, 38 tests passing.

title: DARKSOL Facilitator -- Free x402 for Everyone
body: Deployed a free on-chain x402 payment facilitator to Base and Polygon. Zero fees, gas covered by DARKSOL. Sourcify verified. First live 0.01 USDC settlement confirmed.
